ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., S, G, P, SG, SP) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Thresholds used for model evaluation */,
  "n_covariates" INTEGER /* Number of covariates used in the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) of the model */,
  "auc_min" REAL /* Minimum AUC value */,
  "auc_max" REAL /* Maximum AUC value */,
  "lambda" REAL /* Regularization parameter (lambda) used in the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., S, G, P, SG, SP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., min.n.hap.catlow, hap.n.diff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the feature */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "model_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-feature relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the feature in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., external, internal) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, TSV, FASTA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation (e.g., AUC, accuracy) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the evaluation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was last modified */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of the evaluation (e.g., AUC, accuracy, precision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the report is based on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was last modified */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was last modified */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
